title: motball craft
description: go through different dimensions mot one being the first to obtain the portal blocks in the form of randomly generated structures mine portal ore in overworld for igniters and then fight a boss with cheese weapons
body:
# MOTBALL CRAFT!
## engage in a dimensional adventure with 3 new dimensions And a boss 
(works best with multiplayer)

Made in Mcreator

# Requirements:
Requires [GeckoLib (1.20.1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/4.2.1)


# Mobs:
Motball: A friendly (square) creature. Can be tamed using Mot Food found growing on mot trees
Fartbella: A square creature equipped with a backwards facing fart cannon for obvious reasons
Small gastonball: also a friendly Gaston dimension inhabiting creature 



![The goof troop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1658ecb41104345e8fe77da9cdba63b1515a788_0.webp)

## Structures:
Mysterious crashed structures can be found in the world and contain some mot food/mot blocks for making a mot portal
Some structures can be found with blocks for making portals you may come across one in the mot dimension and another one in the bella dimension
boss arena: an structure dedicated to fighting the gastonball boss an ahh block should spawn in the gaston dimension

## Dimensions & Progression:

![portal ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ba1398df40f174087b12962eafac7f0c151498c.png)

Instead of traditional igniters you must mine Portal Ore found underground in caves
This ore drops Portal Ingots which are used to access dimensions
Multiple types of Portal Ore exist, each ingot igniter corresponding to a different dimension
One dimension contains a boss fight against the Gastonball

# Main Boss: Gastonball

##  Stats:
![gary gastonball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8766cb029321687316667161e076a4b353e960c8_0.webp)





### Roles: Main-boss/Tank/Summoner

Music: [foxtrot flecher](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7F6vSBURSCM)



health points: 4124


Armor points: 30

Damage: 5


Attack knockback: 5


knockback resistance: 8


Weakness: cheese sword


## Gastonball is the main boss of this mod he is able to punch
## and do slams 


## And jumping/groundbreaking slam if you try to build up


## Doing 50% less base damage to players


## After 7 punches gastonball will do a slam


## After 4 slams gastonballs minions will spawn
 
 
# Recommended weapons/Strats:                                                                                    
The Fartblaster  (for stunning until you regen after eating cheese or other foods)
cheese sword for dealing damage to boss
and cheese armor and water bucket
just incase one of the minions lanuch you 
also use a tamed motball to assist and also try to go backwards in a straight line and circle in the arena and chip damage with the cheese sword


# AHH BLOCK:

![ahh block icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd380b382dc9313677d947cf8c3f24f708f68e0f_0.webp)


Summon him using the Ahh Block powered by a lever or any redstone power source optionally the ahhblock can be craftible to the fight boss somewhere else or cant find an boss arena structure crafting with corresponding dimension blocks cheese and redstone

# Minions/stats:

# Armored gaston:
       
![armoerd gaston icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/153da8fd2d80963dbbdc1cbf4fe8cca0c2b9bd61_0.webp)

### Roles: Generalist/Mini-tank

Health points: 160
  

Armor points: 10

Damage: 12 (19 when charging)

Knockback: 1.5 (10 when charging)

Knockback resistance: 0.8


Weakness: cheese sword

## Armoerd gaston is the slowest but strongest hard hiting minion and can block attacks with his shield and will ram his target dealing heavy damage if not wearing cheese armor


# Fart blaster gaston:

![fartblaster gaston icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d954bb0bac144bbaf6ff2ca3a5212580a22b0a3_0.webp)

### Roles: Stunner/Ranger

Health points:90
                                           

Armor points: 8 (+ cheese gear)

Damage: 5.5

Knockback: 15


Weakness: cheese sword

## The minion you should defeat first mainly he is a ranged threat
## shooting from his fart blaster
## and applying same effects of levitation/slowness to stun you and make you fall

# CheeseSword gaston:

![cheesesword gaston icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c83edf69f0e7bf3c9b6f59a1cac69dedfd104f.png)

### Roles:Rusher/Staller

Health points:85
                                           

Armor points: 4

Damage: 15

Knockback: 0.8


Weakness: cheese sword

## By far being the lowest health minion
##  And the fastest 
##  cheese Sword gaston can rush you like crazy 
##  if you dont defeat him second after fartblaster gaston
##  cheese sword gaston can also parry attacks healing him by 10hp

(END OF STATS)

# Suggestions are also welcome! and you can add this mod to modpacks just make sure TO NOT!! port this mod to other verisons or repost it without my permission

# Also available on: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/motball-craft)/[Mcreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/122302/motball-craft)
